message:
fix(audit): batch 95 — third wave audit fixes across 10 subsystems

Fixes 10 bugs found by parallel audit agents across service, HTTP,
web, stream, and epoch modules:

- HIGH: buffer.rs — BufferFuture lost wakeup (added waker to oneshot)
- MEDIUM: buffer.rs — poll_ready lost wakeup (added ready_wakers vec)
- MEDIUM: reconnect.rs — broken inner service not triggering reconnect
- MEDIUM: server.rs — Connection header ignoring comma-separated tokens
- MEDIUM: stream.rs — ResponseHead::serialize CRLF injection (skip bad headers)
- MEDIUM: stream.rs — ambiguous body length (TE+CL both present) not rejected
- MEDIUM: negotiate.rs — XSS in HTML error body (added html_escape)
- MEDIUM: static_files.rs — percent_decode producing wrong chars for non-ASCII
- MEDIUM: compress.rs — Vary header clobber (append instead of overwrite)
- MEDIUM: debounce.rs — spin loop via wake_by_ref (replaced with timer)

Also fixes 3 LOW-severity epoch.rs issues:
- saturating_add for operation_count
- safe u64→u32 cast in arrived()
- fetch_update for saturating epoch advance

All quality gates pass: cargo check, clippy, fmt (our files), 10706 tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
